homeDescription: Welcome to my portfolio, here I showcase my best projects and technical work.
aboutDescription:
I’m Wendell, a game developer from Brazil who really enjoys programming and solving problems.

I’ve been working professionally with Unity and C#, contributing to commercial games and real production environments with international teams. Over the years, I’ve built strong experience developing scalable systems, high-performance gameplay, and production-ready UI, always focused on solving complex problems and delivering reliable results.
draftFeverSynopsis: "Draft Fever Bowl is a competitive multiplayer football management simulation game."
draftFeverDescription: Developed core gameplay systems and high-fidelity UI for a multiplayer PC title, handling complex player flows and large-scale data. Contributed to technical decision-making, optimized performance-critical systems, and solved major pipeline challenges, including migrating the project from HDRP to URP and resolving shader and material issues in production.
pixSynopsis: "PIX Football Manager is a nostalgic, casual football management simulator focused on scouting."
pixDescription: Developed gameplay systems and scalable UI using Unity’s UI Toolkit, building core features and structured interfaces in a real production environment. Focused on maintainability, performance, and clean UI architecture.
rogueSynopsis: "Rogue Masters is a cooperative game of up to 6 players with souls-like style combat."
rogueDescription: Focused on multiplayer networking using Mirror with a P2P topology, developing synchronization systems for gameplay mechanics. Implemented synchronization for animations, projectiles, and game state, ensuring smooth, stable, and responsive online gameplay. Optimized core architecture to maintain performance and reliability during gameplay.
uniqKillerSynopsis: "Combine different types of bodies, combat classes, skills, weapons and skins to create unique heroes, both in appearance and gameplay, for fast PVP battles in urban environments."
uniqKillerDescription: Developed gameplay systems using Photon Fusion, working with dedicated server architecture and multiplayer synchronization. Implemented weapons systems and character customization features, while working with PlayFab services through its dashboard and CI/CD pipelines for automated build generation. Focused on mobile performance optimization while ensuring stable and responsive online gameplay.
petShopSynopsis: "In Pet Shop Fever, you’ll run a bustling Hotel Simulator, where every decision counts!"
petShopDescription: Developed core UI architecture, including screen systems, menus, modals, and animations. Contributed to gameplay systems and AI while working within a highly optimized and complex code framework. Integrated advanced SDKs and followed strict development guidelines, helping shape the project from early prototyping to production-ready features.
amazonSynopsis: "Ten ordinary young people, who lived in different cities, find themselves in the Amazon “by fate” and, little by little, recognize that they have a calling to work in that place. Help our heroes save the Forest!"
amazonDescription: Worked as the primary programmer on the project, improving existing systems and implementing new ones. Contributed to procedural terrain generation, character abilities, enemy behavior, UI systems, and performance optimization.
horrorSynopsis: "Where Are You is a cooperative horror game. Your goal is to investigate haunted houses and exorcise the ghost that haunts them."
horrorDescription: Personal project focused on multiplayer systems for cooperative gameplay, designed to deepen expertise in networking architecture. Built with a strong emphasis on clean, maintainable, and scalable code, ensuring stable player connections. Implemented core multiplayer features including lobby systems and matchmaking, as well as a voice recognition system where player speech is interpreted by the game’s AI, directly impacting gameplay.
origensSynopsis: "Origens is a 2D platform game where the main character takes a journey in a newly created world that evolves geologically through the ages."
origensDescription: Final project for my Digital Games Technology degree, where I was responsible for programming, art, design, and narrative. This is a project I care deeply about, as it was where I truly understood what game development means, working hard to deliver a robust experience within deadlines, with the highest possible quality, while respecting the artistic vision and core concept.
maxProSynopsis: "This app introduces the most engaging way to improve your workout routine, developed for beginner and elite athletes alike who want to achieve their fitness with fun challenges and rewards each day."
maxProDescription: Developed gameplay systems for a mobile experience integrated with MAXPRO fitness equipment, transforming real-world workout input into interactive mechanics. Focused on reliable input processing, responsiveness, and delivering a smooth experience across different user levels.
arrowSynopsis: "You're in a cemetery and have to shoot arrows at hordes of skeletons to survive as long as possible."
arrowDescription: Technical project developed to demonstrate code quality, architecture, and problem-solving skills during a programming evaluation process. This project was particularly challenging, as it was developed right after completing a bootcamp alongside senior programmers, where I learned how to approach real-world game development. Built over the course of a month with daily development, it marked a significant leap in my technical skills and understanding of production-level systems.
topDownShooterSynopsis: "A roguelike shooter where you need to clear areas with enemies and improve your equipment to get further and further."
topDownShooterDescription: Personal project focused on studying modular level generation, combat systems, and progression mechanics, with plans for future release.
planeSynopsis: "A delivery-driven survival experience where you pilot a plane across a flooded world, navigating dangerous skies and managing resources in a dynamic, risk-reward driven environment."
planeDescription: Developing a systems-driven prototype focused on core gameplay loops, including highly responsive and adaptable flight controls, looting systems with item rarity, and resource-based progression. Designed a progression loop centered on collecting rare items, trading them for resources, and reinvesting those resources into aircraft upgrades, creating a continuous risk-reward cycle that drives exploration and player decision-making.
overthrowSynopsis: "In a dream-themed game, you have to knock down the obstacles in your way to get to the end."
overthrowDescription: Developed during my bootcamp period with guidance from senior developers, focusing on core programming concepts and solid technical foundations. During this project, I learned and applied key systems such as object pooling, event-driven architecture, class communication patterns, and game flow management, building a strong foundation for scalable and maintainable code.
fruitsSynopsis: "Face the enemies and collect all the fruits to advance to the next level in this beautiful 2D platformer."
fruitsDescription: Personal project focused on building clean and responsive gameplay mechanics, with emphasis on AI behavior and core Unity systems. Used this project to explore gameplay feel, feedback, and juiceness, working with animations and visual effects to deliver a fluid and stable experience.
bloodlustSynopsis: "Hide in the shadows to survive the hunt, avoid being seen by hunters and quench your bloodlust."
bloodlustDescription: Developed during a 48-hour Game Jam, focusing on gameplay design and programming, including core mechanics and level design.
funkinFighterSynopsis: "Imagine a mix of Street Fighter and Friday Night Funkin'. Keep up with the music to beat your opponent in a street fight."
funkinFighterDescription: Creative project focused on designing unique gameplay mechanics, combining rhythm and fighting systems into a cohesive and functional experience.
jumpSynopsis: "Jump the obstacles and beat the platform challenges to advance to the next stage."
jumpDescription: Remake of my first project, created to evaluate technical growth and improvements in code quality, structure, and overall development approach.
contactMeDescription: If you want to know more about my work or get in touch with me, feel free to check out my networks by clicking on any of the buttons below!
